_meta.name: English (South Africa)
_meta.notes: South African English overrides. British spelling (colour, organisation, metres, tonne), South African construction vocabulary (quantity surveyor, site agent, B-BBEE) and regulators (CIDB, SANS, ASAQS, SAICE). Currency ZAR; metric units; VAT 15 percent. Falls back to en for everything else.

translation.regulator.asaqs: ASAQS (Association of South African Quantity Surveyors)
translation.regulator.saice: SAICE (South African Institution of Civil Engineering)
translation.regulator.sacpcmp: SACPCMP (SA Council for the Project and Construction Management Professions)
translation.contract.gcc: GCC 2015 (General Conditions of Contract for Construction Works)
